attributes.description: Godrej Industries is one of the holding companies of Godrej Group. It is one of the leading manufacturers of oleochemicals on a standalone basis. Godrej Industries is promoter of Godrej Agrovet Ltd and Godrej Properties Ltd. It also has stake in Godrej Consumer Products Ltd [1].

Godrej Industries is one of the holding companies of Godrej Group. It is one of the leading manufacturers of oleochemicals on a standalone basis. Godrej Industries is promoter of Godrej Agrovet Ltd and Godrej Properties Ltd. It also has stake in Godrej Consumer Products Ltd [1].
